ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "home_planet" TEXT /* Home planet of the passenger */,
  "cryosleep" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger is in cryosleep */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin assigned to the passenger */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination planet of the passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "vip_status" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger is a VIP */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date the passenger checked in */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Date the passenger checked out */,
  "transportation_to_ship" INTEGER /* ID of the transportation option used to reach the spaceship */,
  "transportation_from_ship" INTEGER /* ID of the transportation option used to leave the spaceship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_transportation_to_ship FOREIGN KEY ("transportation_to_ship") REFERENCES transportation_options ("transportation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_transportation_from_ship FOREIGN KEY ("transportation_from_ship") REFERENCES transportation_options ("transportation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_cabin FOREIGN KEY ("cabin") REFERENCES cabins ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_destination FOREIGN KEY ("destination") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabins" (
  "cabin_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Number of the cabin */,
  "spaceship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spaceship the cabin belongs to */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., economy, premium) */,
  "cabin_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the cabin can accommodate */,
  "cabin_price" REAL /* Price of the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabins_spaceship_id FOREIGN KEY ("spaceship_id") REFERENCES spaceships ("spaceship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spaceships" (
  "spaceship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spaceship */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the spaceship */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the spaceship */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the spaceship was launched */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spaceship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "planet_name" TEXT /* Name of the planet */,
  "distance_from_earth" REAL /* Distance from Earth in light-years */,
  "estimated_travel_time" TEXT /* Estimated travel time to reach the destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "passenger_id" TEXT /* ID of the passenger using the service */,
  "room_service" INTEGER /* Total amount spent on room service */,
  "food_court" INTEGER /* Total amount spent at the food court */,
  "shopping_mall" INTEGER /* Total amount spent at the shopping mall */,
  "spa" INTEGER /* Total amount spent at the spa */,
  "vr_deck" INTEGER /* Total amount spent on the VR deck */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date the service was used */,
  "service_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the service in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_services_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_options" (
  "transportation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the transportation option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transportation option */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the transportation option */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Whether the transportation option is currently available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "passenger_id" TEXT /* ID of the passenger making the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., booking, service, refund) */,
  "booking_id" TEXT /* ID of the booking associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "passenger_id" TEXT /* ID of the passenger making the booking */,
  "spaceship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spaceship */,
  "cabin_id" TEXT /* ID of the cabin */,
  "destination_id" TEXT /* ID of the destination */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_spaceship_id FOREIGN KEY ("spaceship_id") REFERENCES spaceships ("spaceship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_cabin_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_id") REFERENCES cabins ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
